name: Breeders Choice Dogs Wild Venison Vege 400g
description: The amounts given are recommendations only, individual dog's requirements will vary dependent upon breed, age and activity levels. Feed to maintain a lean active condition. Remember to introduce a new food gradually over 4 days or so, increasing the proportion of a new food daily. Always provide a supply of fresh, clean water for your dog. Feeding Guide Dog size    Weight of Dog Daily feed 400g cans Small 5-12kg 1-2 Medium 12-25 2-3 1/2 Large 25-45kg 3 1/2 - 51/2 Giant 45 -70kg 51/2 - 7 3/4 Analytical Constituents Content Moisture 81% Crude Protein 6% Crude Fat 3% Crude Ash 2% Crude Fibre 0.5% Nutritional adjectives (per kg): Vitamin A 11100IU, Vitamin D3 150 IU, Vitamin E 10 mg, Manganese (manganese oxide)2 mg, Copper (copper II sulphate pentahydrate)1.4mg. (UI = International unit) Storage  Please store in a cool dry place away from direct sunlight. Once opened, cover and store in the refrigerator and use within 24hours. Serve at room temperature. For best before & batch code - see print on base of can.
